developer_response.body: Hey sorry that you're disappointed. You can refund the game via your Meta account as long as you have less than 2 hours play time

reviews.review_description: Its honestly really good needs some work but still im impressed but i just want to ask if im able to get a refund ? Im not trying to its bad, its actually really good but can i get a refund if possible?

I love this game and literally find myself inside of it for hours as new ideas come to mind. It's great to be able to share your work with others and play together. Creating your own world is a lot of fun.
Good potential needs more content like boss fights, taming quests! It’s fun building but it’s not enough to keep it fun and interesting.

My husband and I play Co-Op all the time, we spend hours and hours on this game. Our suggestions would be a wider depth of field for the world, options for different sized worlds by grid size. Snow would be wonderful for sure. Markers to thumbnail and easier reach to different parts of a huge world to easily jump to, maybe portals or something. finally, most definitely more build items.
i paid for this app and it didnt download on my VR

So when I opened it up I started playing and this was a REALLY cringe ripoff of Minecraft I mean the micanics we're different but it was hard to build I kept triggering stuff that I don't know and I just want a refund.

If you bought this game for $10 because you wanted to play multiplayer.  Prepare to NOT play multiplayer.  It is IMPOSSIBLE to construct a game and send an invite to anyone to join.

Seeing as the developer is not writing back to anyone a reviews OR offering instructions on how to do multiplayer.  I’m guessing this game was developed to get your money and not allow any users to have fun.

My suggestion: don’t buy it…


Trying to figure out before I correct my statements.

When I go to cooperative.  Menu on my items belt.  Invite friend.  There are no friends to invite…even with the person logged in.  It says “share your VR experiences.  Add friends from the oculus app.  I do have friends in the oculus app…but none visible in this game.

The other headset also says: session couldn’t be created.  Make sure…is available (obviously they are because their headset and everything else is active)


Do both family users have to purchase the game separately?  I have one account purchased game and shared with family user (in same house hold)

UPDATE:
Both users within a family must purchase the game to enable multiplayer.  I originally thought the game could be shared like all other Oculus games and the multiplayer on different accounts.  This is not the case.  Each user has to purchase the game to enable multiplayer.

Hopefully this review will help others.  Other than confusion the game seems like it has some good potential.

developer_response.body: You can only play together with friends. To do so, please start with "Cooperative", go to a world, press the upper right icon on your "material belt", which opens the multiplayer overview, there you can "Invite Friends". I'll see if I can make it more obvious in a coming release.

reviews.review_title: This is a really good game.
reviews.review_description: This game is amazing for a game still in progress. I know that this isn’t quite Minecraft but it is close enough. I’d rather spend 10.99 on an oculus game than buy a pc and a link cable. I really don’t know why people hat this game so much. You can get used to the controls really fast not only that but the graphics are pretty good for a quest game and you can build almost anything your heart desires. If you think this game is bad, read the description imbecile.
A very fun and immersive building game not survival like mine craft

reviews.review_title: Won’t let me play co op with 2 headsets
reviews.review_description:
Keeps saying need to buy game twice . I have bought game twice . Once for me and once for a friend as gift  on another account . The friend is my son which isn’t an admin but is on separate headset , I haven’t had this before I don’t think . It’s downloaded on both headsets so what’s the problem. ?

Also the whole thing is way too slow it’s like it’s crashed and not working properly but unfortunately that’s how it’s been designed which is totally insane . No mine craft hands either . Total garbage 

Thanks
For $10 I would expect a survival or at least a interesting creative mode. the game is just very bland and should be free

It would seem like this all would have survival but it's not included there is not much fun into playing this game due to that reason

But if you like creative this is the game for you
It is a great game and i know you are sort of working on survival but maybe mod support if not that is okay to.
You can’t do anything

developer_response.body: Well you can build... apart from that I'm workin on survival...

reviews.review_description: If the developer could replay to this I would be happy(: when and are you going to make a survival mode? And instead of the quest controllers could you possibly make arms? Also could you make running feature as well?

Just played this today for about an hour. Perfect for younger players or anyone who just likes to build You can walk, teleport, or fly. Does not have the tools like Minecraft’s ax,shovels, swords etc but does offer a laser gun    Lots of fun for building. Everything is in your inventory you don’t have to mine or craft anything.  Can’t wait to see what improvements are coming. Was really disappointed Mindcraft was not part of the Oculus library but this fills the void
